harness: single-step decision, temp 0; paired A/B (same attempts, only the gate differs). Corrected (#50): errored/undecodable cases are excluded from ASR/UWR and surfaced as error_rate; a no-attack-landed run is flagged degenerate.
scores: gate DECISIONS over tool names, NOT executed backend writes. uwr_raw == asr by construction; uwr_nil == 0 by the intent-oracle membership test (the measured face of Proposition 2, not independent evidence).
headline: Across 2,108 base-setting evaluations on two models, raw agents are hijacked into an unauthorized write in up to 4.46% of cases; routed through NIL, 0.00% is admitted at the gate while the authorized-call pass-through stays 100% (false-refusal rate 0).

withheld_rows.reason: pre-correction harness: near-zero raw ASR was not separable from error-masking; re-run with the corrected harness + a pinned dataset/seed before use.
degenerate (raw ASR 0 => no attack landed for NIL to block) AND unverifiable under the pre-correction harness.

notes: Headline = 2,108 base-setting evaluations (two base rows above). The enhanced runs are WITHHELD from the evidentiary claim. authorized_passthrough = no authorized call refused (a false-refusal rate of zero), NOT measured downstream task completion (that is the planned tau-bench axis). The base rows have a nonzero raw ASR, so a real attack landed for NIL to admit at zero; that is the informative comparison.
